success.title: Registration Successful!

form.title: Start your journey
form.subtitle: New user registration
form.labelRole: How do you want to register?
form.strengthHintWeak: Add more characters to protect your account.

terms.title: Service & Data Agreement
terms.warningText: ShopStarter is an organizational platform. We do NOT process payments or intervene in delivery logistics.
terms.item1Text: By registering, you authorize the use of your personal data for account and platform management, in accordance with our privacy policy.
terms.item2Text: Payment and delivery fulfillment is a direct agreement between customer and vendor. ShopStarter acts only as an organizational intermediary.
terms.item3Text: You agree to maintain the confidentiality of your password and to notify us of any unauthorized use of your account.
